title: Deus DAO - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation followed by flash loan and borrowing on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates oracle data followed by a flash loan and borrowing on a lending protocol in the same transaction
prevention.trigger: ORACLE_MANIPULATION -> FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> LENDING_CONTRACT_INTERACTION in single tx

red_flags: Flash loan followed by borrowing on lending protocol
monitoring_rules: BLOCK ORACLE_MANIPULATION -> FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> LENDING_CONTRACT_INTERACTION in single tx
summary: The attacker manipulated the Muon oracle and then used a flash loan to borrow DEI at a manipulated price, resulting in a significant loss for the protocol.
